themes.label: Grace/Mercy
themes.summary: This chapter highlights undeserved favor, mercy, forgiveness, compassion, or pardon. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And I looked, and rose up, and said unto the nobles, and to the rulers, and to the rest of th...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְהַנּוֹרָא֙: Be not ye afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "אֶצְלָ֑ם: by them - a side; (as a preposition) near".
